text:
Easier Development*
The second reason we hear people choose GraphRAG over vector-only RAG is easier development... once they've pushed through the initial learning curve.
ocr_reason: Large, simple text is directly readable without OCR.

blocks.text: The second reason we hear people choose GraphRAG over vector-only RAG is easier development... once they've pushed through the initial learning curve.
* Weirdly, ease of development [or lack thereof] is also one of the stumbling blocks! How can that be?
